languages.text: "А новый сержант-инструктор Данкош как раз проверял рекрутов-часовых у часовни машинных духов на северо-востоке".
"And our new Drill Sergeant Dankosh was just checking out the sentry recruits at the machine-spirit chapel in the north-east."
languages.original_text: "А новый сержант-инструктор Данкош как раз проверял рекрутов-часовых у часовни машинных духов на северо-востоке".

traits.locale_text: "And our new Drill Sergeant Dankosh was just checking out the sentry recruits at the machine-spirit chapel in the north-east."
"And our new Drill Sergeant Dankosh was just checking out the sentry recruits at the machine-spirit chapel in the north-east."
"And our new Drill Sergeant Dankosh was just checking out the sentry recruits at the cog distribution point for some kind of forces in the north-east."
"And our new Drill Sergeant Dankosh was just checking out the sentry recruits at the machine-spirit chapel in the north-east."
"And our new Drill Sergeant Dankosh was just checking out the sentry recruits at the machine-spirit chapel in the north-east."

languages.text: 「そして、新しい訓練教官のダンコシュが、東北の何らかの部隊の哨戒兵の訓練生を、歯車配給所で見学していたところだった」
languages.original_text: "And our new Drill Sergeant Dankosh was just checking out the sentry recruits at the cog distribution point for some kind of forces in the north-east."

traits.locale_text: 「そして、新しい訓練教官のダンコシュが、東北の何らかの部隊の哨戒兵の訓練生を、歯車配給所で見学していたところだった」

languages.text: «El nuevo sargento de instrucción, Dankosh, estaba inspeccionando a los reclutas de guardia en la capilla de espíritus máquina al nordeste».
languages.original_text: "And our new Drill Sergeant Dankosh was just checking out the sentry recruits at the machine-spirit chapel in the north-east."

traits.locale_text: «El nuevo sargento de instrucción, Dankosh, estaba inspeccionando a los reclutas de guardia en la capilla de espíritus máquina al nordeste».

languages.text: "Und unser neuer Drill Sergeant Dankosh wollte gerade die Wachrekruten an der Maschinengeistkapelle im Nordosten inspizieren."
languages.original_text: "And our new Drill Sergeant Dankosh was just checking out the sentry recruits at the machine-spirit chapel in the north-east."

traits.locale_text: "Und unser neuer Drill Sergeant Dankosh wollte gerade die Wachrekruten an der Maschinengeistkapelle im Nordosten inspizieren."

languages.text: « Et le sergent-instructeur Dankosh est allé inspecter de nouvelles sentinelles en poste à la chapelle de l'esprit de la machine au nord-est. »
languages.original_text: "And our new Drill Sergeant Dankosh was just checking out the sentry recruits at the machine-spirit chapel in the north-east."

traits.locale_text: « Et le sergent-instructeur Dankosh est allé inspecter de nouvelles sentinelles en poste à la chapelle de l'esprit de la machine au nord-est. »

languages.text: “我们的新任操练军士丹科什，刚刚还在东北方向的机魂圣堂里检阅哨兵新兵呢。”
languages.original_text: "And our new Drill Sergeant Dankosh was just checking out the sentry recruits at the machine-spirit chapel in the north-east."

traits.locale_text: “我们的新任操练军士丹科什，刚刚还在东北方向的机魂圣堂里检阅哨兵新兵呢。”

languages.text: "Yeni Talim Çavuşumuz Dankosh da kuzeydoğudaki makine ruhu şapelinde gözcülük yapan acemi askerleri denetliyordu."
languages.original_text: "And our new Drill Sergeant Dankosh was just checking out the sentry recruits at the machine-spirit chapel in the north-east."
